ranked_movies.title: One Battle After Another
ranked_movies.reason: This is the most discussed film across all the Reddit threads, with extensive reviews and high praise from critics and users alike. It has the highest number of comments and engagement, indicating it's the top recommendation.

ranked_movies.title: The Jack Reacher series (including both films and TV adaptations)
ranked_movies.reason: Multiple threads discuss the Jack Reacher franchise, comparing Tom Cruise's portrayal to the books and the Amazon series. It's a consistently hot topic with strong opinions on adaptations.
